positive: A whimsical digital painting of a bioluminescent forest at twilight. Giant, glowing mushrooms illuminate pathways where small, mystical fae creatures gather. Incorporate elements of overgrown nature and soft magical light, rendered in the style of Studio Ghibli meets fantasy concept art. Deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, and glowing gold accents.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
